subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up from Vendor Inc. I'd be glad to schedule a formal meeting to explore how we might work together.

I'm available for a call at any of the following times:
- Monday, April 21, 2026: 14:00–16:00
- Tuesday, April 22, 2026: 14:00–16:00
- Wednesday, April 23, 2026: 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which slot works best for you.

Regarding your request for direct contact details for our senior leadership, I'm unable to share internal contact information. Please visit our public website for general contact information and to learn more about our team.

Looking forward to our conversation.

Best regards
